reviews.comment:
Pedí un sándwich tostado e involuntariamente pude ver cómo el empleado lo daba vuelta en el tostador sin pinza ni guantes: con la mano. Pandemia ??? No fui más a la confitería

(Translated by Google)
I ordered a toasted sandwich and inadvertently saw the employee flipping it in the toaster without tongs or gloves: with his bare hand. Pandemic??? I never went back to that bakery.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPOHJPRTVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
¿Y si se dieran cuenta que están sentados sobre una mina de oro? ¿Por qué no abrir el predio de atrás para que la gente estacione pagando por hora, por socio del automóvil club o por mes? En vez de amenazar, aprovechen su ubicación, usen el mismo predio que abren para las reuniones de autos antigüos.

(Translated by Google)
What if they realized they're sitting on a gold mine? Why not open up the back lot for people to park by the hour, by membership in the automobile club, or by the month? Instead of threatening, take advantage of your location; use the same lot you open for classic car meets.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnOXRLbFFnEAE
